biological_replicate: each of which contained two biological replicates
technical_replicate: Proteomics experiments were performed in two biological replicates.
experimental_design: we employed a proximity labeling strategy in cultured human fetal glial cells
factor_value: how the presence and number of glycosaminoglycan (GAG) chains present on NRXN1α influence these interactions
number_of_fractions: no fractionation or pre-fractionation is described
number_of_technical_replicates: each data set containing two technical replicates of each experimental condition.
